statement: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 non-GAAP gross margin was 75.0% (GAAP 74.9%), with Q2 guided to the same level.
why: A sustained ~75% gross margin reflects strong pricing power amid supply-constrained accelerator demand.

impact.mechanism: Stable premium margins indicate demand outstripping supply and pricing power for NVIDIA GPUs.

evidence.source: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 financial results press release (Form 8-K / NVIDIA IR)
evidence.excerpt: GAAP and non-GAAP gross margins were 74.9% and 75.0%, respectively.
